tracking_banner.title: Tracking starts from {{date}}.
tracking_banner.description: We can only record analytics from the moment the feature went live.

index.total_revenue_referee_orders: Total revenue from the referee's orders.
index.first_referral_revenue_subtitle: Total revenue from referee's first orders.
index.subsequent_referral_revenue_subtitle: Total revenue from referee's repeated orders.
index.total_referee_orders_subtitle: Total orders from referee including first orders and subsequent orders.
index.new_enrolled_referrers_subtitle: Shows referrers distribution by day in selected period.
index.welcome_emails_viewed_subtitle: Number of times the email was opened by recipients.
index.shares_title: Shares by referrers resulting in referred traffic
index.shares_subtitle: Each share channel click or copy link action counts once (no deduplication).
index.store_visits_subtitle: Each click on the referral link counts once (first and repeat visits, no deduplication).
index.unique_store_visits_title: Unique store visits from referral traffic
index.unique_store_visits_subtitle: Same as store visits, but deduplicated per day by user agent and IP (one unique per device+IP per day).
index.top_referrer_subtitle: Highlights the top-performing referrers based on successful referrals and revenue generated.
index.referrer_tooltip: Name of the customer who referred others.
index.successful_referrals_tooltip: Number of friends who completed a purchase using their referral.
index.revenue_tooltip: Total revenue earned through their referrals.
index.last_active_tooltip: The most recent date the referrer successfully referred a friend.
index.entry_point_performance_subtitle: Shows how each referral entry point performs.
index.source_tooltip: Where the referral link is shown. Each customer is counted once, even if they see it multiple times.
index.impressions_tooltip: Number of unique customers who saw the referral entry point.
index.copy_share_tooltip: Number of unique customers who clicked to copy or share the link. Multiple clicks from the same customer = counted once.
index.ctr_tooltip: Percentage of impressions that resulted in a copy/share.
index.top_share_channel_tooltip: The channel customers shared the most. Each customer counts once per channel.
index.sources_of_referees_subtitle: Show which sources your referees come from.
index.sharing_sources_subtitle: Show which sources your referrers share referral link/code.
